tools.name: job_search
tools.description: Search jobs by title, skill, location. Filter by type and recency.

tools.name: salary_insights
tools.description: Salary ranges for a role in a location.

tools.name: remote_jobs
tools.description: Find remote-only positions for a role or skill.

tools.name: company_jobs
tools.description: All open positions at a specific company.

tools.name: job_trends
tools.description: Top companies hiring for a field. Rising demand signals.

tools.name: job_compare
tools.description: Compare job markets across cities for a role: job count and salaries.

tools.name: job_alerts_check
tools.description: How many new jobs posted today/3 days/week for a query. Quick market pulse.
